nasb.text: To whom shall I speak and give warning That they may hear? Behold, their ears are closed And they cannot listen. Behold, the word of the Lord has become a reproach to them; They have no delight in it.

esv.text: To whom shall I speak and give warning, that they may hear? Behold, their ears are uncircumcised, they cannot listen; behold, the word of the Lord is to them an object of scorn; they take no pleasure in it.

cnv.text: 我可以向誰說話，向誰警告， 使他們可以聽從呢？ 他們的耳朵未受割禮， 不能聽聞； 看哪！他們以耶和華的話為羞辱， 一點也不喜歡。

ccb.text: 我可以警告谁呢？谁会听呢？ 他们耳朵闭塞，什么也听不见！ 看啊，耶和华的话逆耳， 他们毫不喜欢。
